title: cineraria × lyratifolia
intro: Cineraria × lyratifolia, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Senecio cruentus and Cineraria maritima, is a flowering plant known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cineraria × lyratifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Cineraria × lyratifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
